backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a workshop POS system, including inventory management, transaction recording, shop settings (with logo upload), and daily/monthly reporting with persistent state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — fixing the XLSX export file validity and ensuring all UI text is in Indonesian — to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of every component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Kasir Bengkel', mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Inventory, Transactions, Reports, Settings), wraps the app in a dark ThemeProvider, and renders a persistent Sidebar layout.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component rendered in Indonesian, displaying shop info, transaction details, itemized list with quantities and prices, subtotal, optional discount, and a thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark sidebar navigation component with five Indonesian-labeled links (Kasir, Inventori, Transaksi, Laporan, Pengaturan) and active-state highlighting using TanStack Router's `useLocation`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous Internet Computer actor, invalidating all dependent queries whenever the identity or actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shop settings, inventory items, and transactions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for theming, and includes print styles for receipt output.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using browser CompressionStream/DecompressionStream APIs to build ZIP-based XLSX files.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier page component that manages a shopping cart, handles checkout by creating transactions and updating inventory quantities, and displays a printable receipt dialog.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with CRUD dialogs for items, search/filter, and Excel import/export functionality using Indonesian UI text.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, fetching data via custom hooks and displaying in cards/tables.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing users to update shop name, address, phone, thank-you message, and upload a logo with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page with search/date filters, detail view dialog, print receipt support, and delete confirmation for past transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Kasir Bengkel' tracking existing features, known issues (corrupt Excel download), and architectural notes (Indonesian-only UI).
